reasoning: A multi-sector marketplace application requires a clean, accessible light mode to showcase diverse businesses clearly. Orange and white create an energetic, friendly, and approachable vibe.

components.name: RoleToggle
components.description: Tab or toggle button to switch between Customer and Business Owner on login/signup.
components.styles: Flex row, rounded-full bg-surface_secondary p-1, active tab gets bg-white, shadow-sm, text-primary.

components.name: SearchBarHeader
components.description: Top header with search input, magnifying glass icon, and a location selector dropdown.
components.styles: bg-white p-4 shadow-sm. Search input rounded-lg bg-surface border border-border.

components.name: SectorCategoryList
components.description: Horizontal scroll view of categories (Barber, Dentist, etc.)
components.styles: Items are rounded-xl bg-white border border-border p-3. Active item border-primary text-primary.

components.name: BusinessCard
components.description: Card showing business image, name, address, and rating.
components.styles: rounded-xl bg-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden mb-4. Image h-32. Content p-4.

components.name: TimeSlotGrid
components.description: Grid of appointment times. Free vs Taken states.
components.styles: Taken slots: bg-danger_light border-danger text-danger. Free slots: border-primary text-primary bg-white. Selected slot: bg-primary text-white.

components.name: OwnerDashboardWidgets
components.description: Cards for owner stats or quick actions (Manual Appointment, Add Staff).

components.name: AppointmentListView
components.description: Toggleable view for staff/owner to see appointments as a vertical list or a 2x2/4x4 grid.
components.styles: Toggle icons top right. List item: row layout. Grid item: square card layout.

testing.guideline: All interactive elements, forms, and navigation buttons must include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="customer-login-button"`). Use kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a React Native (Expo) app using standard components. Target file extension is `.js` (e.g., `/app/frontend/app/index.js`), avoid `.tsx`.
Map the provided design tokens manually in your standard React Native StyleSheet, focusing heavily on primary Orange and White aesthetics.
Onboarding screen must split into 'Customer' and 'Business Owner'. Business owner gets a specific QR code generation option upon signup to invite staff.
Staff login should use a QR code scanning feature accessible from a top corner icon on the login screen.
Create a dynamic Home Screen listing sectors (Barber, Dentist, Psychologist, Physiotherapist, Nutritionist), with a search/location bar at the top.
On business pages, appointments must show taken slots clearly in RED (#EF4444) and strictly prevent multi-booking conflicts.
The Owner/Staff dashboard must provide toggles for appointments list view (vertical) versus grid view (horizontal pairs or 4s).
Create the required REST API endpoints in Python (FastAPI/Flask) allowing JSON appointment data export.
Ensure `data-testid` is added across all interactable components to follow testing guidelines.
